question: Did the article titled "Cost-effective plant-based medium for enhanced spore production of B. amyloliquefaciens CN12 for biofertilizer application" appear in the journal Scientific Reports in March 2026?
Did the author correction for the Global Burden of Disease study on chronic respiratory diseases appear in the journal Nature Medicine on March 11, 2026?
Did the research article titled "The open-source multi-wavelength non-invasive blood glucose sensing system" appear in the journal Nature Medicine in December 2025?
Did the Global Burden of Disease study on chronic respiratory diseases report declines in mortality between 1990 and 2023, particularly during the COVID-19 pandemic?

Did the phase 3 trial on genotype-stratified adjunctive dexamethasone for tuberculous meningitis find that outcomes were significantly better for human immunodeficiency virus-negative Vietnamese adults stratified by LTA4H genotype?
Did the study on the identity of Vietnamese narrative culture appear in the journal Humanities and Social Sciences Communications in January 2021?
Did the Global Burden of Disease study on dietary iron deficiency report that the burden remains high in men, children, and residents in high socio-demographic index countries?

Did the Global Burden of Disease study on drug use disorders show that the prevalence of amphetamine, cannabis, cocaine, and opioid use disorders increased in high-income countries, particularly in the USA, between 1990 and 2023?
Did the benchmark titled "A benchmark of expert-level academic questions to assess AI capabilities" describe itself as an open-ended academic benchmark with narrow subject coverage?
Did the camera-trap evidence article confirm that the silver-backed chevrotain Tragulus versicolor remains in the wild in Vietnam after more than 25 years?
